rikka.material.preference.MaterialSwitch.app:summary: Allow external automation apps (Tasker, MacroDroid, Automate) to send and receive WhatsApp messages through intents
rikka.material.preference.MaterialSwitch.app:title: Enable Tasker/Automation Integration

Preference.app:summary: Learn how to set up intents, view available variables, and see example automations
Preference.app:title: Automation Guide & Samples

Preference.app:summary: View a log of recent automation events and their status
Preference.app:title: Automation History
